title: Promise not resolved in LangChain code node
symptom: The user encounters issues when trying to use the embeddings node, leading to confusion about the API exposed by the node.
not_this_if: The code does not involve promises
The embeddings node is not connected
root_cause: The error occurs because the promise returned by the method to get input connection data is not resolved. This leads to the variable being undefined, causing issues when trying to use it as a function.
fix_steps: Add 'await' before the method call to resolve the promise
Use the resolved value as intended in the code
agent_instruction: Ensure to resolve the promise when accessing input connection data in the LangChain code node.
